name: @moeys/ui
description: MoEYS design-system workspace — Storybook (with per-component axe a11y checks) and Chromatic visual regression for the shared UI primitives in ../../src/shared/ui.

scripts.test-a11y:ci: concurrently -k -s first -n SB,A11Y "http-server storybook-static -p 6006 --silent" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:6006 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006"

//deps: CHOS-405: this package is intentionally NOT folded into the root pnpm-workspace glob (see ../../pnpm-workspace.yaml) so the main `frontend` CI job's `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` stays untouched and fast — same offline-safe pattern as CHOS-404's @axe-core/playwright. The Storybook/Chromatic toolchain is heavy and is installed only by the dedicated `chromatic` CI job, which `cd`s here and runs a normal (networked) `pnpm install`. Runtime/peer versions below are pinned to match ../../package.json so the bundled components behave identically to the app.
